narrativeProgression.summary: An antagonist demand threatens collateral unless evidence is withheld.
narrativeProgression.beatNarrative: The antagonist sends a noon deadline: open the lockbox publicly or lose your only witness.

threadUpdates.update: Noon Ultimatum: The antagonist sends a noon deadline: open the lockbox publicly or lose your only witness.
Peripheral signal tied to Keypad access hash export remains unresolved.
Cross-day mismatch suggests archival tampering tied to Keypad access hash export.
No new movement on false lead this cycle.
NPC language mirrors player choices with unsettling precision.

evidenceDrops.title: Midnight Lockbox - Day 18 voicemail transcript
evidenceDrops.summary: Artifact advances verified evidence chain and supports deduction around Keypad access hash export.

imagePrompt.style: hyper-realistic forensic horror, analog imperfection, grounded true-crime framing
imagePrompt.prompt: Midnight Lockbox ARG artifact Day 18. Type: voicemail_transcript. Clue focus: Keypad access hash export. Location: Gallowglass 24-hour storage facility and storm-drain service tunnels. Phase: Danger & Direct Involvement. Camera: Canon EOS R6, 35mm prime, ISO 3200, f/1.8, 1/40 shutter. Visual defects: sensor noise, halation bloom, slight motion blur, fingerprint smudge, timestamp burn-in. Lighting: practical sodium-vapor spill with deep shadow falloff, imperfect white balance. Composition: evidence-forward framing, handwritten marks, believable wear, no cinematic polish. No intentional misdirection.
imagePrompt.negativePrompt: clean CGI, fantasy look, glossy studio lighting, over-sharpened edges, watermark, logo, gore fetish, cartoon style

audioPrompt.style: psychological dread, industrial ambience, noisy field recording authenticity
audioPrompt.prompt: Midnight Lockbox voicemail_transcript audio cue for day 18. Clue anchor: Keypad access hash export. Phase: Danger & Direct Involvement. Texture: low drone bed, distant metallic resonance, intermittent room-tone dropouts. Include one decipherable spoken fragment and one environmental clue (HVAC hum, rail click, siren bleed, pager chirp). Add mild tape flutter, codec smear, clipped transients, and uneven dynamic floor to keep it grounded.

interactions.messageTemplate: {{player_alias}}, before you move: chain-of-custody on today's drop is unstable. Confirm Keypad access hash export and tell me if your last call still stands (decision.day_17.primary).
I heard my own words on a line I never called. If you still trust {{trusted_contact}}, do not forward this to the wrong desk.
Off-record: I can publish tonight, but your previous choice is already circulating. I need one verification point tied to Keypad access hash export.
You chose {{last_major_choice}} and still think this is about evidence. Check the mirror timestamp and decide who you are willing to sacrifice.
I watched your response window close. If you still want the living truth, compare day 03 to today before sunrise.

puzzle.title: Day 18 Puzzle
puzzle.objective: Use the new evidence and prior logs to resolve contradiction around Keypad access hash export.
instructions: Extract timestamp, sender route, and one lexical anomaly from today's artifacts.
Compare against at least one artifact from a previous day.
Submit a concise deduction statement before unlocking the next high-risk contact.
hintLadder: Hint 1: One timestamp appears valid but is offset from device timezone.
Hint 2: Cross-check sender metadata against yesterday's call-log route.
Hint 3: The answer keyword starts with KEYP.
puzzle.failureConsequence: Antagonist sends a personalized pressure message and witness trust drops.

awarenessMoments.trigger: if decision.log contains any entry for previous day
awarenessMoments.lineTemplate: You repeated yesterday's pattern ({{last_major_choice}}). People who survive this case learn faster.

awarenessMoments.trigger: if trusted contact changed within last 3 days
awarenessMoments.lineTemplate: Your channel loyalty shifted to {{trusted_contact}}. That tells me what you fear most.

adaptiveLines: Reference previous choice without breaking realism.
Acknowledge response latency as if monitored by live actors.
Escalate or soften tone based on trust flags and solved puzzles.
